dataList.name: Basta Giochetti
dataList.desc: Ottiene [AttackUp] pari al numero del turno attuale

dataList.name: Questo Va' Dritto Nel Libro
dataList.desc:
A inizio Turno: Infligge 1 [RicardoBookRaid] su ogni nemico

Quando viene colpito, infligge 2 [RicardoBookRaid] sull'attaccante
Sul Colpo, riduce l'[RicardoBookRaid] sul bersaglio di 1

Ottiene [RicardoTattooRaid] pari alla somma di [RicardoBookRaid] ridotte da questa Unità durante l'Incontro

dataList.name: Un Peccato Troppo Grave
dataList.desc: Quando usa un'Abilità, se il bersaglio ha 20+ [RicardoBookRaid], converte tutte le Monete in [SuperCoin] Se le Abilità di Ricardo bersagliano un nemico col massimo di [RicardoBookRaid], questa ottiene l'attributo 'Bersaglio Fisso'

dataList.name: Smetti Di Resistere e Accetta la Tua Punizione.
dataList.desc: I bersagli che hanno equipaggiato le Abilità Difensive subiscono -30% danni

dataList.name: Amore Fraterno
dataList.desc: Se i PV scendono al 60%, passa alla fase successiva e rimuove tutti gli status su di sé (esclude gli status esclusivi).

dataList.name: Quella Heishou Mi Ha Fatto Un Male Cane
dataList.desc:
Passiva esclusiva alla Seconda Fase 2
Inflict [BurstAgility] e [BurstZilu] su Ricardo
Ricardo subisce +50% danni Gola

dataList.name: Sei il Bersaglio Principale della Vendetta del Medio
dataList.desc: A Inizio Turno: Se c'è un nemico con 30 [RicardoBookRaid], ottiene 1 Slot Abilità in più e usa "QUESTA È UN'ESECUZIONE IMMEDIATA!!!"

dataList.name: Il Fratellone
dataList.desc: A partire dal secondo turno, ogni alleato recupera 10 PS a inizio turno (include sé stesso) Subisce -20% danni da [Combustion], [Laceration], [Vibration], [Burst], e [Sinking]

dataList.name: Ignoralo
dataList.desc: Ottiene l'attributo 'Panico Fisso' A Fine Turno: se è in stato di Panico, riporta i PS a 0. Se i PV scendono al 50%, passa alla fase successiva e rimuove tutti gli status su di sé (esclude gli status esclusivi).

dataList.name: Ignoralo
dataList.desc:
Ottiene l'attributo 'Panico Fisso'
A Fine Turno: se è in stato di Panico, riporta i PS a 0.

dataList.name: Distorsione di Tipo Ambientale: Laboratorio Fotografico
dataList.desc: Quest'unità non può essere uccisa e subisce danni solo dalle Abilità che la bersagliano come bersaglio principale La Velocità di quest'unità è fissata a 1 A inizio turno, ottiene 3 [PhotoTransitionChoiCamera] dopo essere entrato nell'Incontro A fine turno, se [PhotoTransitionChoiCamera] scende a 0, o se i PV di quest'unità scendono a 1, attiva i seguenti effetti nel turno successivo: - Rimuove sé stessa e Personale di Classe 2 della N Corp dall'Incontro - Fa tornare Im Gyeong-eop - Cambia il terreno

dataList.name: Swordplay of the Homeland [Sal] - Great Hwando
dataList.desc: Encounter Start: Gain 5 [ChoiSwordsmanship] Assume a different Battleform of the Homeland every 3 turns Turn End: If this unit has Shield, gain 5 [Breath] and +2 [Breath] Count next turn When Im Gyeong-eop meets the following conditions, she uses a pattern that includes the "Bow of the Homeland - Arrowloose" Skill - When this unit lost all Clashes for 2 turns in a row (does not check for Unopposed Attacks) - In the turn after the turn in which this unit spent in Stagger - When in Low Morale or Panic
dataList.flavor:
The Sword of the Homeland, S Corp.'s traditional art of swordsmanship, is also divided into three branches: Sal, Pi, and Ppyeo.
Within their teachings exist techniques to hew and cleave through creatures of colossal stature such as Sanguns.
To perform them in full, a swordsman must wield a great hwando capable of bearing the strain of the techniques.

dataList.name: Dujeong Brigandine [Sal] - Iron Bulwark
dataList.desc: Take -30% damage from [Laceration], [Burst], and [Sinking] (rounded down) Gain the effects of [PanicChangeLock]; If this unit is Panicked at Turn End, reset SP to 45 Upon entering the Encounter for the first time, gain 5 [ChoiSwordsmanshipShield] When [ChoiSwordsmanshipShield] expires, become Staggered next turn At the end of the turn this unit was Staggered, enter a new phase - Phase 1: This unit's HP cannot drop below 70% - At less than 70% HP, end the turn immediately and enter a new phase - At the start of the turn the phase changed, heal up to 45 SP
dataList.flavor:
The Eastern Warstride Armors are not so much "equipped" as they are "piloted." S Corp.'s Dujeong Brigandine is one example of such armor.
Much like R Corp.'s Powered Armor Suit and the Full Plate Armor used by the Knights of the West, the Dujeong Brigandine greatly augments the user's offensive and defensive combat capabilities.
Yet these advantages do not mean that armors of such potency are readily supplied for combat personnel. Each unit has its own unique controls and comes with the limitation of requiring separate fuels.
What remains certain, however, is that, as with all the aforementioned armors, once a rider has familiarized himself with the Dujeong Brigandine's extended reach and heightened power output, he becomes a machine of war that strides across battlefields with the promise of slaughter.

dataList.name: Martial Arts of Perseverance
dataList.desc:
On Clash Win, gain +2 [Breath] Count (2 times per turn)

If the target this unit's Skill hit has less than 5 [Laceration] Potency, inflict 1 [Laceration] and +2 [Laceration] Count at Attack End (once per Skill, 2 times per turn, prioritize the main target)
dataList.flavor:
'There are those who persevere in training for lack of talent. Then there are those blessed with talent, only to let it rust.'
'All men say that the title of Apex Blade can only be seized by the gifted.'
'It matters not. Until the day comes for this blade of mine to rise high enough to meet the clouds, I shall persevere in honing my prowess.'

dataList.name: Headsplitting Memory
dataList.desc: On Clash Lose, gain 1 [RegretSCorp] (once per turn)

dataList.name: Developed Memories
dataList.desc: Upon entering the Encounter, gain 3 [PhotoTransitionChoi] Turn Start: At 0 [PhotoTransitionChoi] Stack, Retreat and transition into a different location When Returning to the field, based on current Battleform of the Homeland, gain or lose [ChoiSwordsmanship] - When in [ChoiSwordsmanshipOne]: Gain Stack - When in [ChoiSwordsmanshipMany]: Lose Stack If [ChoiSwordsmanshipShield] expires, [PhotoTransitionChoi] expires

dataList.name: Reflectrial
dataList.desc: At 10+ Clashes against the same enemy, randomly gain or lose Clash Power by (Clash Count/10) in a Clash (rounded down) Max Potency cap for [Laceration], [Burst], and [Sinking]: 30 Max Count cap for [Laceration], [Burst], and [Sinking]: 10 Max Potency cap for [Combustion] and [Vibration]: 50 Max Count cap for [Combustion] and [Vibration]: 30

dataList.name: Mismatched Memories
dataList.desc: Turn Start: Gain the following effects: - When in [ChoiSwordsmanshipOne]: At less than 5 [ChoiSwordsmanship] Stack, gain (5 - [ChoiSwordsmanship] Stack) [Vulnerable] - When in [ChoiSwordsmanshipMany]: At more than 5 [ChoiSwordsmanship] Stack, gain [Vulnerable] equal to surplus [ChoiSwordsmanship] Stack past 5

dataList.name: Swordplay of the Homeland [Sal] - Rend Flesh from Flesh
dataList.desc:
Encounter Start: Gain 5 [ChoiSwordsmanship]

Assume a different Battleform of the Homeland every 3 turns

On Hit using a Slash Skill, gain 1 [Breath] Potency (once per Skill)

When the following conditions are met, use a pattern that includes the "Bow of the Homeland - Arrowloose" Skill
- When this unit lost all Clashes for 2 turns in a row (does not check for Unopposed Attacks)
- Turn after Stagger
- When in Low Morale or Panic

Turn Start: At Min or Max [ChoiSwordsmanship] Stacks, use a powerful Skill
If this unit used the "Bow of the Homeland - Arrowloose" Skill in the last turn, use a powerful Skill regardless of [ChoiSwordsmanship] Stack on self
At 60% or lower HP, use a powerful Skill regardless of [ChoiSwordsmanship] Stack on self
dataList.flavor:
The Sword of the Homeland passed down in the Sal Court Circle is not, at its heart, an art of killing.
To cut and cut again until blood runs dry and the bone is laid bare—that is the essence of this art that strips the opponent's flesh into ribbons.
That is the Sword of the Homeland practiced by "Sal."

dataList.name: Swordplay of the Homeland [Sal] - Shift Battleform
dataList.desc: Turn Start: Gain or lose 2 [ChoiSwordsmanship] Stack based on Battleform of the Homeland on self (does not activate in the first turn of the Encounter) - [ChoiSwordsmanshipOne]: Gain Stack - [ChoiSwordsmanshipMany]: Lose Stack In the turn where this unit equipped Envy Skills, this unit will not be affected by [ChoiSwordsmanship] Stack adjustment effects, and will reset [ChoiSwordsmanship] Stack to 5 next turn

dataList.name: Dujeong Brigandine [Sal] - Great Mountain
dataList.desc: Take -30% damage from [Combustion], [Laceration], [Vibration], [Burst], [Sinking] (rounded down, excluding Stagger Threshold raised by [VibrationExplosion]) Gain the effects of [PanicChangeLock]; If this unit is Panicked at Turn End, reset SP to 45 Turn Start: Gain the following effects: - When in [ChoiSwordsmanshipOne]: At less than 5 [ChoiSwordsmanship] Stack, gain (5 - [ChoiSwordsmanship] Stack) [Vulnerable] - When in [ChoiSwordsmanshipMany]: At more than 5 [ChoiSwordsmanship] Stack, gain [Vulnerable] equal to surplus [ChoiSwordsmanship] Stack past 5
dataList.flavor:
The three Court Circles of Sal, Pi, and Ppyeo each remade the standard Dujeong Brigandine of S Corp. into forms suited to their own doctrines.
The olden tales say that the "Sal" has ever been the first to spearhead a slaughter, eager to cleave the enemy's flesh before any other.
The "Pi" harvests the blood that spills forth from each opened flesh wound and turns it into endurance on the battlefield.
The "Ppyeo" takes the close of a slaughter. They part one joint from the other, bringing the enemy to their knees. Then, a blade through the neckbone finishes the collective act of killing.

dataList.name: Scattering Memories
dataList.desc: On death, give +1 E.G.O resource of the least-owned Affinity
